title: Two-factor bypass when switching auth providers
description: When the identity provider session expires, users entering the SSO login flow get caught in an infinite redirect loop between our app and the IdP. The browser eventually shows 'too many redirects' after approximately 15 cycles. Affects all SSO-configured organizations.

title: Search results pagination skips page 3
description: Users filling out the multi-step support request form lose all entered data when their session expires mid-process. The form does not warn about impending expiration or save draft state. This has caused significant user frustration.

title: Service account tokens never expire despite policy
description: When an admin changes a user's role from 'editor' to 'viewer', the change does not take effect until the user clears their browser cache or the server-side session cache expires (4 hours). During this window the user retains editor permissions.

title: Support bulk ticket reassignment from list view
description: Ticket descriptions currently only support plain text. Support agents frequently need to include code snippets, formatted logs, and structured reproduction steps. Markdown support would significantly improve ticket readability.

title: VAT calculation wrong for EU customers
description: Discount code SAVE20 returns 'invalid code' at checkout despite being active in the promotions dashboard. The code was created on Feb 1st with no expiration date. Testing confirms it fails for all plan types. Approximately 50 customers have reported this issue.

title: Add custom field support for ticket metadata
description: The legal team requires ticket exports in PDF format with company branding for compliance audits. Currently they screenshot the UI or copy-paste into Word documents. A native PDF export would save approximately 4 hours per monthly audit.

title: Service account tokens never expire despite policy
description: When an admin changes a user's role from 'editor' to 'viewer', the change does not take effect until the user clears their browser cache or the server-side session cache expires (4 hours). During this window the user retains editor permissions.

title: Background job queue backed up 2 hours during peak
description: After migrating from Redis 6 to Redis 7, the cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40%. Investigation shows the serialization format changed and existing cached entries are being treated as misses. A cache warm-up script is needed post-migration.

title: Deactivated user retains API key access for 24h
description: When a team member is removed from an organization, their previously created shared links remain active. These links continue to provide access to ticket data even though the user no longer has an account. There is no mechanism to bulk-revoke links by user.

title: Password reset email contains broken link
description: The dark mode toggle in user preferences works within the current tab but reverts to light mode when a new tab is opened. The preference is stored in sessionStorage instead of localStorage, causing it to not persist.

title: Guest link shares expose internal ticket comments
description: The OAuth token refresh flow does not validate the original scope grant. A token initially issued with read-only scope can be refreshed to request read-write scope without user consent. This was identified by an external security researcher.

title: Elasticsearch queries timing out for wildcard searches
description: Generating the monthly analytics report for accounts with over 500MB of ticket data causes the worker process to run out of memory (OOM killed). The report builder loads the entire dataset into memory. Streaming or chunked processing is needed.

title: VAT calculation wrong for EU customers
description: Customer (account #AC-4892) reports being charged $299 twice on March 5th for their annual Pro plan renewal. Stripe shows two successful charges: ch_3NkL9x and ch_3NkLBw, 4 seconds apart. The customer's card was charged $598 total. Immediate refund of duplicate charge needed.

title: Password reset email contains broken link
description: The dark mode toggle in user preferences works within the current tab but reverts to light mode when a new tab is opened. The preference is stored in sessionStorage instead of localStorage, causing it to not persist.

title: Database connection pool exhausted at 200 concurrent users
description: After migrating from Redis 6 to Redis 7, the cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40%. Investigation shows the serialization format changed and existing cached entries are being treated as misses. A cache warm-up script is needed post-migration.

title: Support multiple email addresses per contact
description: Our team uses Slack as the primary communication channel. We need ticket notifications (new, assigned, status change) pushed to a configurable Slack channel. Currently the team manually checks the dashboard every 30 minutes and misses urgent tickets.

title: Coupon stacking bypass allows negative totals
description: Customers using 3D Secure enabled cards cannot update their payment method. The update flow redirects to the bank's 3DS page but the callback URL returns a 404. This affects approximately 15% of our European customer base.

title: Date picker shows wrong month on first open
description: On Safari 17.2, clicking the login button does nothing — no error, no redirect, no console output. The issue does not reproduce on Chrome or Firefox. Multiple customers have reported being unable to access their accounts from macOS Sonoma.

title: Support bulk ticket reassignment from list view
description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: CSV export truncates rows after 10,000 records
description: Navigating through search results, page 3 is completely skipped. Clicking 'Next' from page 2 goes directly to page 4. The URL parameter updates correctly but the API returns page 4 data. Affects all search queries with more than 2 pages.

title: API rate limiter counts OPTIONS as requests
description: The dark mode toggle in user preferences works within the current tab but reverts to light mode when a new tab is opened. The preference is stored in sessionStorage instead of localStorage, causing it to not persist.

title: HTTP 500 on checkout when cart has 50+ items
description: Webhook delivery is configured to retry 3 times but actually retries 7 times. Each retry doubles the delay, causing some webhooks to be delivered up to 2 hours after the initial failure. This is overwhelming receiving services with duplicate events.

title: Drag-and-drop reorder saves in wrong sequence
description: Users filling out the multi-step support request form lose all entered data when their session expires mid-process. The form does not warn about impending expiration or save draft state. This has caused significant user frustration.

title: Invoice PDF shows previous company address
description: EU customers in Germany, France, and Netherlands are being charged 19% VAT regardless of their actual country rate. France should be 20%, Netherlands 21%. This affects approximately 340 active subscriptions and may have compliance implications.

title: Add Slack integration for ticket notifications
description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: File upload returns 413 but file is under limit
description: Scheduled reports configured for specific timezones are being sent at the wrong time. The offset appears to be inverted — UTC+5 users receive reports as if they were UTC-5. This started after the daylight saving time transition.

title: Search index 4 hours stale after bulk import
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Create public-facing status page
description: Power users create the same complex filter combinations repeatedly. Saved filters would allow them to bookmark frequent queries like 'my open critical tickets' or 'unassigned billing issues this week' and access them with one click.

title: Deactivated user retains API key access for 24h
description: When a team member is removed from an organization, their previously created shared links remain active. These links continue to provide access to ticket data even though the user no longer has an account. There is no mechanism to bulk-revoke links by user.

title: CSV export truncates rows after 10,000 records
description: Navigating through search results, page 3 is completely skipped. Clicking 'Next' from page 2 goes directly to page 4. The URL parameter updates correctly but the API returns page 4 data. Affects all search queries with more than 2 pages.

title: Page load time degrades linearly with filter count
description: Thumbnail generation for uploaded images runs synchronously on the main API thread, blocking all other requests for 2-3 seconds per image. This should be offloaded to a background worker queue to prevent request handling degradation.

title: Database connection pool exhausted at 200 concurrent users
description: Thumbnail generation for uploaded images runs synchronously on the main API thread, blocking all other requests for 2-3 seconds per image. This should be offloaded to a background worker queue to prevent request handling degradation.

title: Team member removal does not revoke shared links
description: When an admin changes a user's role from 'editor' to 'viewer', the change does not take effect until the user clears their browser cache or the server-side session cache expires (4 hours). During this window the user retains editor permissions.

title: Date picker shows wrong month on first open
description: The dark mode toggle in user preferences works within the current tab but reverts to light mode when a new tab is opened. The preference is stored in sessionStorage instead of localStorage, causing it to not persist.

title: Search results pagination skips page 3
description: File uploads under the 10MB limit are being rejected with a 413 Payload Too Large error. The actual threshold appears to be around 8.2MB. The upload progress bar reaches 100% before the error appears, confusing users.

title: Image thumbnail generation blocks main thread
description: The main dashboard page takes over 12 seconds to render when the account has more than 1,000 tickets. Profiling shows the bottleneck is a non-indexed COUNT query that runs for each status category. Adding composite indexes should reduce this to under 500ms.

title: Create mobile-responsive ticket view
description: Support managers need to reassign tickets in bulk when a team member goes on leave. Currently each ticket must be opened individually and reassigned. With 40+ tickets per developer, this takes over an hour of manual work.

title: Support multiple email addresses per contact
description: Different customer segments require different metadata on tickets (e.g., enterprise needs contract ID, retail needs order number). Custom fields would eliminate the current workaround of stuffing metadata into the description field.

title: Cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40% after migration
description: After migrating from Redis 6 to Redis 7, the cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40%. Investigation shows the serialization format changed and existing cached entries are being treated as misses. A cache warm-up script is needed post-migration.

title: CORS error when embedding dashboard in iframe
description: Users filling out the multi-step support request form lose all entered data when their session expires mid-process. The form does not warn about impending expiration or save draft state. This has caused significant user frustration.

title: Date picker shows wrong month on first open
description: Webhook delivery is configured to retry 3 times but actually retries 7 times. Each retry doubles the delay, causing some webhooks to be delivered up to 2 hours after the initial failure. This is overwhelming receiving services with duplicate events.

title: Support Markdown in ticket descriptions
description: The legal team requires ticket exports in PDF format with company branding for compliance audits. Currently they screenshot the UI or copy-paste into Word documents. A native PDF export would save approximately 4 hours per monthly audit.

title: Prorated charge incorrect when switching mid-cycle
description: A refund of $49.99 was processed for order ORD-2024-7156 on March 8th. The Stripe dashboard confirms the refund but the customer's account balance in our system still shows the original charge. The billing history page has no record of the refund.

title: Stripe webhook missing for subscription cancellation
description: EU customers in Germany, France, and Netherlands are being charged 19% VAT regardless of their actual country rate. France should be 20%, Netherlands 21%. This affects approximately 340 active subscriptions and may have compliance implications.

title: Add SLA timer display on ticket cards
description: Support managers need to reassign tickets in bulk when a team member goes on leave. Currently each ticket must be opened individually and reassigned. With 40+ tickets per developer, this takes over an hour of manual work.

title: HTTP 500 on checkout when cart has 50+ items
description: Users filling out the multi-step support request form lose all entered data when their session expires mid-process. The form does not warn about impending expiration or save draft state. This has caused significant user frustration.

title: Redis memory usage growing 500MB/day from orphaned keys
description: Thumbnail generation for uploaded images runs synchronously on the main API thread, blocking all other requests for 2-3 seconds per image. This should be offloaded to a background worker queue to prevent request handling degradation.

title: Two-factor bypass when switching auth providers
description: The OAuth token refresh flow does not validate the original scope grant. A token initially issued with read-only scope can be refreshed to request read-write scope without user consent. This was identified by an external security researcher.

title: Image thumbnail generation blocks main thread
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Implement saved search filters per user
description: Ticket descriptions currently only support plain text. Support agents frequently need to include code snippets, formatted logs, and structured reproduction steps. Markdown support would significantly improve ticket readability.

title: Two-factor bypass when switching auth providers
description: Users with the 'viewer' role can navigate directly to /admin/settings and view sensitive configuration including API keys and webhook secrets. The sidebar correctly hides the admin link but no server-side authorization check exists on the settings endpoint.

title: Cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40% after migration
description: During rolling deployments, all connected WebSocket clients attempt to reconnect simultaneously, creating a thundering herd that overwhelms the new pods. The reconnection uses a fixed 1-second delay instead of exponential backoff with jitter.

title: OAuth scope escalation via token refresh flow
description: The OAuth token refresh flow does not validate the original scope grant. A token initially issued with read-only scope can be refreshed to request read-write scope without user consent. This was identified by an external security researcher.

title: Stripe webhook missing for subscription cancellation
description: Discount code SAVE20 returns 'invalid code' at checkout despite being active in the promotions dashboard. The code was created on Feb 1st with no expiration date. Testing confirms it fails for all plan types. Approximately 50 customers have reported this issue.

description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: Payment method update fails with 3D Secure cards
description: Customers using 3D Secure enabled cards cannot update their payment method. The update flow redirects to the bank's 3DS page but the callback URL returns a 404. This affects approximately 15% of our European customer base.

title: CSV export takes 45 seconds for 10k rows

title: Create public-facing status page
description: Our team uses Slack as the primary communication channel. We need ticket notifications (new, assigned, status change) pushed to a configurable Slack channel. Currently the team manually checks the dashboard every 30 minutes and misses urgent tickets.

title: Add SLA timer display on ticket cards
description: Several enterprise customers have requested two-factor authentication as a requirement for their security compliance. Currently we only support password-based auth which does not meet SOC 2 requirements for some of our clients.

title: Add audit log for ticket field changes
description: Different customer segments require different metadata on tickets (e.g., enterprise needs contract ID, retail needs order number). Custom fields would eliminate the current workaround of stuffing metadata into the description field.

title: Refund issued but balance not updated in dashboard
description: Customer upgraded from Basic ($29/mo) to Premium ($99/mo) three days ago. Payment was processed successfully (ORD-2024-8821) but premium features like advanced analytics and API access remain locked. Manual feature flag toggle is the current workaround.

title: Create public-facing status page
description: Support managers need to reassign tickets in bulk when a team member goes on leave. Currently each ticket must be opened individually and reassigned. With 40+ tickets per developer, this takes over an hour of manual work.

title: Discount code SAVE20 not applying at checkout
description: Discount code SAVE20 returns 'invalid code' at checkout despite being active in the promotions dashboard. The code was created on Feb 1st with no expiration date. Testing confirms it fails for all plan types. Approximately 50 customers have reported this issue.

title: Dark mode toggle does not persist across tabs
description: Navigating through search results, page 3 is completely skipped. Clicking 'Next' from page 2 goes directly to page 4. The URL parameter updates correctly but the API returns page 4 data. Affects all search queries with more than 2 pages.

title: OAuth scope escalation via token refresh flow
description: Guest share links for tickets expose the internal comments tab which may contain sensitive information about other customers or internal processes. The share link should only show the ticket description and status, not the full comment thread.

title: Search index 4 hours stale after bulk import
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Implement saved search filters per user
description: The legal team requires ticket exports in PDF format with company branding for compliance audits. Currently they screenshot the UI or copy-paste into Word documents. A native PDF export would save approximately 4 hours per monthly audit.

title: Guest link shares expose internal ticket comments
description: Guest share links for tickets expose the internal comments tab which may contain sensitive information about other customers or internal processes. The share link should only show the ticket description and status, not the full comment thread.

title: Image thumbnail generation blocks main thread
description: Under load testing at 200 concurrent users, the application exhausts the database connection pool (max 20 connections) and subsequent requests queue for up to 30 seconds. The pool size needs to be increased and connection timeout reduced.

title: Create mobile-responsive ticket view
description: Power users create the same complex filter combinations repeatedly. Saved filters would allow them to bookmark frequent queries like 'my open critical tickets' or 'unassigned billing issues this week' and access them with one click.

description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

description: When a team member is removed from an organization, their previously created shared links remain active. These links continue to provide access to ticket data even though the user no longer has an account. There is no mechanism to bulk-revoke links by user.

title: Add custom field support for ticket metadata
description: Ticket descriptions currently only support plain text. Support agents frequently need to include code snippets, formatted logs, and structured reproduction steps. Markdown support would significantly improve ticket readability.

title: Page load time degrades linearly with filter count
description: The main dashboard page takes over 12 seconds to render when the account has more than 1,000 tickets. Profiling shows the bottleneck is a non-indexed COUNT query that runs for each status category. Adding composite indexes should reduce this to under 500ms.

title: Database connection pool exhausted at 200 concurrent users
description: Generating the monthly analytics report for accounts with over 500MB of ticket data causes the worker process to run out of memory (OOM killed). The report builder loads the entire dataset into memory. Streaming or chunked processing is needed.

title: Background job queue backed up 2 hours during peak
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Payment method update fails with 3D Secure cards
description: Customer (account #AC-4892) reports being charged $299 twice on March 5th for their annual Pro plan renewal. Stripe shows two successful charges: ch_3NkL9x and ch_3NkLBw, 4 seconds apart. The customer's card was charged $598 total. Immediate refund of duplicate charge needed.

title: Credit note not generated after partial refund
description: Customer was granted a 14-day trial extension via the admin panel but the billing portal still shows the original trial end date. The customer received an email confirming the extension. The mismatch is causing confusion and the customer may be charged early.

title: Login fails silently on Safari 17.2
description: On Safari 17.2, clicking the login button does nothing — no error, no redirect, no console output. The issue does not reproduce on Chrome or Firefox. Multiple customers have reported being unable to access their accounts from macOS Sonoma.

title: Webhook delivery retries exceed configured max
description: Exporting tickets to CSV works for small datasets but silently truncates at exactly 10,000 rows. The file appears complete with headers and no error indication. Customers with large accounts are receiving incomplete exports.

title: Two-factor bypass when switching auth providers
description: Users with the 'viewer' role can navigate directly to /admin/settings and view sensitive configuration including API keys and webhook secrets. The sidebar correctly hides the admin link but no server-side authorization check exists on the settings endpoint.

title: Tax exempt status not carrying over to new invoices
description: All invoices generated after March 1st show the company's previous address (123 Old Street) instead of the current address (456 New Avenue). The billing settings page shows the correct address. This appears to be a caching issue in the PDF generation service.

title: GraphQL N+1 queries on ticket list with comments
description: During rolling deployments, all connected WebSocket clients attempt to reconnect simultaneously, creating a thundering herd that overwhelms the new pods. The reconnection uses a fixed 1-second delay instead of exponential backoff with jitter.

description: All invoices generated after March 1st show the company's previous address (123 Old Street) instead of the current address (456 New Avenue). The billing settings page shows the correct address. This appears to be a caching issue in the PDF generation service.

title: Database connection pool exhausted at 200 concurrent users
description: After running a bulk ticket import (5,000+ tickets), the search index takes 4 hours to fully update. During this window, newly imported tickets do not appear in search results. The indexer processes records sequentially rather than in batches.

title: SAML assertion replay accepted within 5-minute window

description: When a team member is removed from an organization, their previously created shared links remain active. These links continue to provide access to ticket data even though the user no longer has an account. There is no mechanism to bulk-revoke links by user.

title: Redis memory usage growing 500MB/day from orphaned keys
description: Thumbnail generation for uploaded images runs synchronously on the main API thread, blocking all other requests for 2-3 seconds per image. This should be offloaded to a background worker queue to prevent request handling degradation.

title: Elasticsearch queries timing out for wildcard searches
description: After running a bulk ticket import (5,000+ tickets), the search index takes 4 hours to fully update. During this window, newly imported tickets do not appear in search results. The indexer processes records sequentially rather than in batches.

title: Export tickets to PDF with company branding
description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: Add two-factor authentication option
description: Support managers need to reassign tickets in bulk when a team member goes on leave. Currently each ticket must be opened individually and reassigned. With 40+ tickets per developer, this takes over an hour of manual work.

title: Password reset email contains broken link
description: Webhook delivery is configured to retry 3 times but actually retries 7 times. Each retry doubles the delay, causing some webhooks to be delivered up to 2 hours after the initial failure. This is overwhelming receiving services with duplicate events.

title: Implement saved search filters per user
description: The legal team requires ticket exports in PDF format with company branding for compliance audits. Currently they screenshot the UI or copy-paste into Word documents. A native PDF export would save approximately 4 hours per monthly audit.

title: Customer charged twice for annual plan renewal
description: EU customers in Germany, France, and Netherlands are being charged 19% VAT regardless of their actual country rate. France should be 20%, Netherlands 21%. This affects approximately 340 active subscriptions and may have compliance implications.

title: SSO login loop when IdP session expires
description: Users with the 'viewer' role can navigate directly to /admin/settings and view sensitive configuration including API keys and webhook secrets. The sidebar correctly hides the admin link but no server-side authorization check exists on the settings endpoint.

title: Role change not reflected until manual cache clear
description: The IP allowlist configured in organization security settings is enforced on web endpoints but not on mobile API endpoints (/api/mobile/*). A user connecting from a blocked IP can still access all data through the mobile app. Discovered during a security audit.

title: API rate limiter counts OPTIONS as requests
description: Password reset emails contain a link pointing to the old domain name. Clicking the link results in a DNS resolution failure. This has been blocking all password resets since the domain migration on February 28th.

title: Role change not reflected until manual cache clear
description: Guest share links for tickets expose the internal comments tab which may contain sensitive information about other customers or internal processes. The share link should only show the ticket description and status, not the full comment thread.

title: Timezone offset breaks scheduled reports
description: On Safari 17.2, clicking the login button does nothing — no error, no redirect, no console output. The issue does not reproduce on Chrome or Firefox. Multiple customers have reported being unable to access their accounts from macOS Sonoma.

title: Stripe webhook missing for subscription cancellation
description: All invoices generated after March 1st show the company's previous address (123 Old Street) instead of the current address (456 New Avenue). The billing settings page shows the correct address. This appears to be a caching issue in the PDF generation service.

title: Invoice PDF shows previous company address
description: All invoices generated after March 1st show the company's previous address (123 Old Street) instead of the current address (456 New Avenue). The billing settings page shows the correct address. This appears to be a caching issue in the PDF generation service.

title: Guest link shares expose internal ticket comments
description: Users with the 'viewer' role can navigate directly to /admin/settings and view sensitive configuration including API keys and webhook secrets. The sidebar correctly hides the admin link but no server-side authorization check exists on the settings endpoint.

title: Dashboard takes 12 seconds to load with 1000+ tickets
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Search index 4 hours stale after bulk import
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Support bulk ticket reassignment from list view
description: Power users create the same complex filter combinations repeatedly. Saved filters would allow them to bookmark frequent queries like 'my open critical tickets' or 'unassigned billing issues this week' and access them with one click.

title: Cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40% after migration
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: WebSocket reconnect storm during rolling deploys
description: During rolling deployments, all connected WebSocket clients attempt to reconnect simultaneously, creating a thundering herd that overwhelms the new pods. The reconnection uses a fixed 1-second delay instead of exponential backoff with jitter.

title: Implement ticket merge for duplicates
description: Several enterprise customers have requested two-factor authentication as a requirement for their security compliance. Currently we only support password-based auth which does not meet SOC 2 requirements for some of our clients.

title: Service account tokens never expire despite policy
description: The OAuth token refresh flow does not validate the original scope grant. A token initially issued with read-only scope can be refreshed to request read-write scope without user consent. This was identified by an external security researcher.

title: Redis memory usage growing 500MB/day from orphaned keys
description: Following the v2.4.1 deployment on March 3rd, API p99 latency increased from 800ms to 3.2 seconds. The regression correlates with the new audit logging middleware that performs a synchronous database write on every request. Moving to async logging should resolve this.

title: Database connection pool exhausted at 200 concurrent users
description: Generating the monthly analytics report for accounts with over 500MB of ticket data causes the worker process to run out of memory (OOM killed). The report builder loads the entire dataset into memory. Streaming or chunked processing is needed.

title: Add SLA timer display on ticket cards
description: Different customer segments require different metadata on tickets (e.g., enterprise needs contract ID, retail needs order number). Custom fields would eliminate the current workaround of stuffing metadata into the description field.

title: Drag-and-drop reorder saves in wrong sequence
description: When a user adds more than 50 items to their cart and proceeds to checkout, the server returns an HTTP 500 error. The checkout page shows a generic error message. This was first reported by a customer on March 12th and affects both web and mobile clients.

title: Add SLA timer display on ticket cards
description: Power users create the same complex filter combinations repeatedly. Saved filters would allow them to bookmark frequent queries like 'my open critical tickets' or 'unassigned billing issues this week' and access them with one click.

title: Cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40% after migration
description: Thumbnail generation for uploaded images runs synchronously on the main API thread, blocking all other requests for 2-3 seconds per image. This should be offloaded to a background worker queue to prevent request handling degradation.

title: CORS error when embedding dashboard in iframe
description: File uploads under the 10MB limit are being rejected with a 413 Payload Too Large error. The actual threshold appears to be around 8.2MB. The upload progress bar reaches 100% before the error appears, confusing users.

title: Trial extension not reflected in billing portal
description: Customer was granted a 14-day trial extension via the admin panel but the billing portal still shows the original trial end date. The customer received an email confirming the extension. The mismatch is causing confusion and the customer may be charged early.

title: Team member removal does not revoke shared links
description: Users with the 'viewer' role can navigate directly to /admin/settings and view sensitive configuration including API keys and webhook secrets. The sidebar correctly hides the admin link but no server-side authorization check exists on the settings endpoint.

title: Create public-facing status page
description: Power users create the same complex filter combinations repeatedly. Saved filters would allow them to bookmark frequent queries like 'my open critical tickets' or 'unassigned billing issues this week' and access them with one click.

title: Report generation OOMs on datasets over 500MB
description: Under load testing at 200 concurrent users, the application exhausts the database connection pool (max 20 connections) and subsequent requests queue for up to 30 seconds. The pool size needs to be increased and connection timeout reduced.

title: Discount code SAVE20 not applying at checkout
description: Customer was granted a 14-day trial extension via the admin panel but the billing portal still shows the original trial end date. The customer received an email confirming the extension. The mismatch is causing confusion and the customer may be charged early.

title: File upload returns 413 but file is under limit
description: Password reset emails contain a link pointing to the old domain name. Clicking the link results in a DNS resolution failure. This has been blocking all password resets since the domain migration on February 28th.

title: Add two-factor authentication option
description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: Support multiple email addresses per contact
description: Our team uses Slack as the primary communication channel. We need ticket notifications (new, assigned, status change) pushed to a configurable Slack channel. Currently the team manually checks the dashboard every 30 minutes and misses urgent tickets.

title: Support Markdown in ticket descriptions
description: Different customer segments require different metadata on tickets (e.g., enterprise needs contract ID, retail needs order number). Custom fields would eliminate the current workaround of stuffing metadata into the description field.

title: VAT calculation wrong for EU customers
description: Customer was granted a 14-day trial extension via the admin panel but the billing portal still shows the original trial end date. The customer received an email confirming the extension. The mismatch is causing confusion and the customer may be charged early.

title: OAuth scope escalation via token refresh flow
description: When an admin changes a user's role from 'editor' to 'viewer', the change does not take effect until the user clears their browser cache or the server-side session cache expires (4 hours). During this window the user retains editor permissions.

title: Export tickets to PDF with company branding
description: The legal team requires ticket exports in PDF format with company branding for compliance audits. Currently they screenshot the UI or copy-paste into Word documents. A native PDF export would save approximately 4 hours per monthly audit.

title: Cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40% after migration
description: Under load testing at 200 concurrent users, the application exhausts the database connection pool (max 20 connections) and subsequent requests queue for up to 30 seconds. The pool size needs to be increased and connection timeout reduced.

title: Plan upgrade not activating premium features
description: All invoices generated after March 1st show the company's previous address (123 Old Street) instead of the current address (456 New Avenue). The billing settings page shows the correct address. This appears to be a caching issue in the PDF generation service.

title: Guest link shares expose internal ticket comments
description: When a user account is deactivated via the admin panel, their existing API keys remain functional for up to 24 hours. The key revocation runs as a background job that only executes once daily at midnight UTC. This creates a security window for terminated employees.

title: Support multiple email addresses per contact
description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: Background job queue backed up 2 hours during peak
description: Generating the monthly analytics report for accounts with over 500MB of ticket data causes the worker process to run out of memory (OOM killed). The report builder loads the entire dataset into memory. Streaming or chunked processing is needed.

title: Viewer role can access admin settings via direct URL
description: When a user account is deactivated via the admin panel, their existing API keys remain functional for up to 24 hours. The key revocation runs as a background job that only executes once daily at midnight UTC. This creates a security window for terminated employees.

title: Dashboard takes 12 seconds to load with 1000+ tickets
description: The main dashboard page takes over 12 seconds to render when the account has more than 1,000 tickets. Profiling shows the bottleneck is a non-indexed COUNT query that runs for each status category. Adding composite indexes should reduce this to under 500ms.

title: API p99 latency spiked to 3.2s after v2.4.1 deploy
description: After migrating from Redis 6 to Redis 7, the cache miss rate jumped from 5% to 40%. Investigation shows the serialization format changed and existing cached entries are being treated as misses. A cache warm-up script is needed post-migration.

title: Guest link shares expose internal ticket comments
description: The IP allowlist configured in organization security settings is enforced on web endpoints but not on mobile API endpoints (/api/mobile/*). A user connecting from a blocked IP can still access all data through the mobile app. Discovered during a security audit.

title: Add Slack integration for ticket notifications
description: Power users create the same complex filter combinations repeatedly. Saved filters would allow them to bookmark frequent queries like 'my open critical tickets' or 'unassigned billing issues this week' and access them with one click.

title: Support bulk ticket reassignment from list view
description: Customers have requested a public-facing status page that shows current system health and any ongoing incidents. This would reduce inbound support tickets during outages by approximately 30% based on industry benchmarks.

title: Team member removal does not revoke shared links
description: When a user account is deactivated via the admin panel, their existing API keys remain functional for up to 24 hours. The key revocation runs as a background job that only executes once daily at midnight UTC. This creates a security window for terminated employees.

title: Two-factor bypass when switching auth providers
description: When the identity provider session expires, users entering the SSO login flow get caught in an infinite redirect loop between our app and the IdP. The browser eventually shows 'too many redirects' after approximately 15 cycles. Affects all SSO-configured organizations.

title: API p99 latency spiked to 3.2s after v2.4.1 deploy
description: Under load testing at 200 concurrent users, the application exhausts the database connection pool (max 20 connections) and subsequent requests queue for up to 30 seconds. The pool size needs to be increased and connection timeout reduced.

title: Deactivated user retains API key access for 24h
description: The OAuth token refresh flow does not validate the original scope grant. A token initially issued with read-only scope can be refreshed to request read-write scope without user consent. This was identified by an external security researcher.

title: Role change not reflected until manual cache clear
description: When the identity provider session expires, users entering the SSO login flow get caught in an infinite redirect loop between our app and the IdP. The browser eventually shows 'too many redirects' after approximately 15 cycles. Affects all SSO-configured organizations.

title: GraphQL N+1 queries on ticket list with comments
description: Thumbnail generation for uploaded images runs synchronously on the main API thread, blocking all other requests for 2-3 seconds per image. This should be offloaded to a background worker queue to prevent request handling degradation.

title: Add custom field support for ticket metadata
description: Ticket descriptions currently only support plain text. Support agents frequently need to include code snippets, formatted logs, and structured reproduction steps. Markdown support would significantly improve ticket readability.

title: IP allowlist not enforced on mobile app endpoints
description: The IP allowlist configured in organization security settings is enforced on web endpoints but not on mobile API endpoints (/api/mobile/*). A user connecting from a blocked IP can still access all data through the mobile app. Discovered during a security audit.

description: Generating the monthly analytics report for accounts with over 500MB of ticket data causes the worker process to run out of memory (OOM killed). The report builder loads the entire dataset into memory. Streaming or chunked processing is needed.

title: VAT calculation wrong for EU customers
description: Customer (account #AC-4892) reports being charged $299 twice on March 5th for their annual Pro plan renewal. Stripe shows two successful charges: ch_3NkL9x and ch_3NkLBw, 4 seconds apart. The customer's card was charged $598 total. Immediate refund of duplicate charge needed.

description: Users filling out the multi-step support request form lose all entered data when their session expires mid-process. The form does not warn about impending expiration or save draft state. This has caused significant user frustration.
